features: What You Get: You will get 10 pieces rectangle snap hair clips which clamp on card, enough for daily use or hairdressing; Suitable for women and girls with hair no matter long or short, thick or thin, straight or curly
Large Size Hair Clips : the length for the hair clip is 7cm/2.75inch and width for the hair clip is 1.9cm/0.75inch, a proper size to clip hair and hold in place
Material: Our hair clips are made of metal, strong, durable and not easy to go rust or faded, can be used for long time; the metal hair clips are smooth and comfortable to wear

Easy to Use: These hair barrettes are easy to wear and remove without hurting hair; Non-slip, hold your bangs or fringes in proper place, suitable for hair styling and hairdressing; Will be good helper when makeup or washing face
Great Gift: Simple design but practical usage, these black hair clips are great as gift for women and girls
description: LuenHego Snap Hair Clips - Practical Hair Accessories for Hairdressing or Hair Styling When washing face or makeup, these hair clips will help clip and keep the hair from messing. When working or doing housework, our snap clips help hold the bangs or fringes of hair. When dating or hanging out, this hair clips help make a hairdressing or hair styling. Key Features: A.Simple design, the hair clip is lovely and functional. B.Easy to wear and remove, no hurt to hair C.Medium Size, suitable for women, girls with hair no matter straight or curly, long or short, thin or thick D.
